description: New handler src/tools/review-pr.ts. Input schema: { pr_number: number (required), focus?: string[], depth?: 'quick' | 'thorough', session_id?: string }. Calls github.ts to fetch diff + metadata, then the Codex client with buildPrReviewPrompt. Returns PrReviewResult extending CodeReviewResult with { pr_number: number, pr_title: string }. Register in src/server.ts alongside the existing 5 tools. Reuses the chunking path from Phase 4 for large PRs. Acceptance: full tool handler test with mocked github + Codex client; integration test verifies registration in the tool list.
title: review_pr MCP tool handler
